channel.title: Infocomm on Greg Herlein
channel.description: Recent content in Infocomm on Greg Herlein

item.title: The Room Is a Robot (And I'm Going to InfoComm to Prove It)
item.description: Next week I get to watch one of my favorite things: see a room full of smart people handed a hard problem and watch them figure it out in real time. I’m headed to InfoComm to mentor, judge, and sit on a panel for an idea sprint about AI at the edge. And I could not be more excited.
